hotelId is null — @NotNull validation must reject this.
checkInDate is null — @NotNull validation must reject this.
numberOfGuests=0 violates @Min(1) constraint.

request.description: The hotel manager who owns the hotel can view the booking.

item.name: Get Booking Rooms - Forbidden as Other Guest (403)

request.description: Unauthorized guest cannot view rooms.

request.description: Guest updates their own PENDING booking. Dates and room count change.
Admin can update any booking.

item.name: Update Booking - Forbidden as Other Guest (403)

request.description: Another guest cannot update someone else's booking.
Manager role is not authorized to update bookings.

Trying to update a non-existent booking returns 404.

item.name: Cancel Booking - Success as Guest Owner (200)

Admin cancels any booking.
Managers must use the manager-cancel endpoint, not this one.

item.name: Cancel Booking - Forbidden as Other Guest (403)

request.description: Another guest cannot cancel someone else's booking.
Cancellation without a reason param should return 400.
Cancelling a non-existent booking returns 404.

request.description: Admin previews any booking's cancellation policy.

item.name: Preview Cancellation Policy - Forbidden as Other Guest (403)

request.description: A guest that doesn't own this booking cannot preview the policy.

item.name: Manager Cancel Booking - Success as Manager (200)

request.description: Hotel manager cancels a guest booking. Guest receives 100% refund + bonus.

request.description: Admin can also use the manager-cancel endpoint.

item.name: Manager Cancel Booking - Forbidden as Guest (403)

request.description: Guests cannot use the manager-cancel endpoint.

request.description: Manager previews the bonus breakdown without actually cancelling.
